Got Questions?

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know before you activate your AI team.

Are these real influencers?
They're AI-generated creators — realistic, professional, and designed to sell. Unlike real influencers, they work exclusively for your store, never miss a video release day, and cost you absolutely nothing.
Do I need to create any content myself?
No. Every video comes ready-made with captions. Just download from your dashboard and post to your TikTok or Instagram.
What products do the videos promote?
Your products — the 100+ AI Toolkits already loaded in your store. Each video is specifically designed to drive sales to your store.
Will people know these are AI influencers?
Our AI creators are designed to look and sound completely natural. They're powered by the latest AI video technology, so the content feels authentic and professional.
How much money can I make?
You keep 60–70% of every sale. Many store owners earn $3,000–$5,000+ per month once their AI team's videos gain momentum. Results depend on how often you post and your audience.
Can I use all 5 creators at the same time?
Yes. Activate any or all of the five creators in one click from your dashboard. Each one comes with a library of videos you can schedule or post immediately.
How long does it take to set up?
Your store is live in under 60 seconds. Your AI team is available in the dashboard immediately — you can have videos posting to TikTok the same day.
Is Ecomzy really free?
Yes. Your store, your products, your AI influencer team, and your personal manager support are all free during the 14-day trial. After that, $39/month keeps your business running — no upfront costs.
